 {"id":"bd-3u58","title":"[IDEA-04.3] CursorStore example integration (polling connector)","description":"## Goal
Provide example wiring in a polling-style connector (Telegram/Gmail-like) to demonstrate correct CursorStore usage.

## Details
- Add a reference example in testkit or a minimal connector harness.
- Demonstrate lease acquisition, cursor load, commit, and snapshot.

## Tests
- Integration test that restarts the connector and verifies no duplicate processing.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Example shows the full lifecycle and is copy/paste ready.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:31:50.973236146Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T19:31:50.982909128Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3u58","depends_on_id":"bd-2cqj","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:31:50.982849848Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3vu7","title":"[IDEA-09.1] fcp manifest fix: command implementation","description":"## Goal
Implement `fcp manifest fix` command in CLI.

## Details
- Parse manifest TOML, recompute interface hash.
- Support `--check` and `--write`.
- Output JSON summary (changes, lint results).

## Tests
- Unit tests for CLI arg parsing and output format.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Command works on existing manifest files without running connector.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:36:43.938220352Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T19:36:43.947087157Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3vu7","depends_on_id":"bd-1wqu","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:36:43.947047964Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"bd-3zhv","title":"[IDEA-01.4] SDK runtime kit: tests + reference examples","description":"## Goal
Provide reference examples and comprehensive tests for the runtime kit.

## Details
- Add a minimal streaming example (fake gateway) and polling example (fake API) in testkit.
- Add golden-log snapshots for health transitions (dependent on bd-11g2 schema).
- Document usage patterns in `docs/STUDY_Clawdbot_Connector_Patterns.md` and/or SDK README.

## Tests
- Unit + integration tests for both supervisors.
- Validate logging against JSONL schema (once available).

## Acceptance Criteria
- Examples compile and can be used as copy/paste templates by connector authors.
- Tests cover common failure modes (timeouts, 429, disconnect, resume).","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:27:46.561879044Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T18:31:51.852971230Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3zhv","depends_on_id":"bd-11g2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:28:34.508761764Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3zhv","depends_on_id":"bd-2zy9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:27:46.571210031Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":17,"issue_id":"bd-3zhv","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implementation Complete - Created supervisor_examples.rs in fcp-testkit with:

1. FakePollingApi - configurable mock API with error injection (timeout, rate limit, auth failed, network error)
2. FakePollingConnector - reference connector using PollingSupervisor
3. FakeStreamingSession - reference session implementing StreamingSession trait
4. FakeUpdate / FakeStreamEvent - example event types

Added 8 tests covering API success, error injection, rate limiting, fatal errors, and connector shutdown/failure modes.

Also fixed pre-existing test failures in policy_simulation.rs (missing requires_posture and posture_attestation fields).

All 36 fcp-testkit tests pass.","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:31:51Z"}]}
+{"id":"bd-3zhv","title":"[IDEA-01.4] SDK runtime kit: tests + reference examples","description":"## Goal
Provide reference examples and comprehensive tests for the runtime kit.

## Details
- Add a minimal streaming example (fake gateway) and polling example (fake API) in testkit.
- Add golden-log snapshots for health transitions (dependent on bd-11g2 schema).
- Document usage patterns in `docs/STUDY_Clawdbot_Connector_Patterns.md` and/or SDK README.

## Tests
- Unit + integration tests for both supervisors.
- Validate logging against JSONL schema (once available).

## Acceptance Criteria
- Examples compile and can be used as copy/paste templates by connector authors.
- Tests cover common failure modes (timeouts, 429, disconnect, resume).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:27:46.561879044Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T18:32:13.520423475Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T18:32:13.520352523Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3zhv","depends_on_id":"bd-11g2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:28:34.508761764Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-3zhv","depends_on_id":"bd-2zy9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:27:46.571210031Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":17,"issue_id":"bd-3zhv","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Implementation Complete - Created supervisor_examples.rs in fcp-testkit with:

1. FakePollingApi - configurable mock API with error injection (timeout, rate limit, auth failed, network error)
2. FakePollingConnector - reference connector using PollingSupervisor
3. FakeStreamingSession - reference session implementing StreamingSession trait
4. FakeUpdate / FakeStreamEvent - example event types

Added 8 tests covering API success, error injection, rate limiting, fatal errors, and connector shutdown/failure modes.

Also fixed pre-existing test failures in policy_simulation.rs (missing requires_posture and posture_attestation fields).

All 36 fcp-testkit tests pass.","created_at":"2026-01-28T18:31:51Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-4zr0","title":"[IDEA-21] Zone Policy Diff + Rollback Tooling","description":"## Background
Zone policies change over time. Operators need a safe way to review diffs and roll back with clear evidence and approvals.

## Goals
- Compute diffs between ZonePolicy/ZoneDefinition objects.
- Generate rollback plans and highlight risky changes.
- Expose CLI output for audits and CI.

## Non-goals
- Automatic policy edits without approval.

## Approach
- Implement a structured diff engine for zone policy objects.
- Add CLI `fcp policy diff` and `fcp policy rollback --plan`.
- Require ApprovalToken for rollbacks in high-trust zones.

## Risks
- Diff noise from ordering changes; enforce canonical ordering before diff.

## Success Criteria
- Operators can see precise changes to capabilities, transport policy, and ceilings.
- Rollback outputs are deterministic and auditable.

## Acceptance Criteria (Refined)
- Diff flags risk‑increasing changes (capabilities, transport policy).
- Rollback plan is deterministic and auditable.
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-27T21:44:10.503006401Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:59:34.659410710Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-691o","title":"[IDEA-11.3] Streaming health tests + simulated loop","description":"## Goal
Provide tests for streaming health behavior using a simulated loop.

## Details
- Simulate missed heartbeat and ensure state transitions.
- Verify log fields emitted per schema.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Tests validate deterministic health transitions.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:38:42.944848343Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T19:38:42.959348765Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-691o","depends_on_id":"bd-j7w1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T19:38:42.959304573Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-69vu","title":"[IDEA-21.3] E2E policy rollback scenario","description":"## Scenario
- Apply policy change in harness.
- Diff and generate rollback plan.
- Verify rollback plan restores previous policy state.

## Logging
- JSONL entries for diff and rollback plan IDs.
## Logging
- Emit structured JSONL per `docs/STANDARD_Testing_Logging.md` with `test_name`, `module`, `phase`, `correlation_id`, and `result`.
- Persist JSONL artifacts and validate with `fcp_conformance::schemas::validate_e2e_log_jsonl`.
","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-27T21:44:18.725208927Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-27T22:56:13.948395477Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-69vu","depends_on_id":"bd-23d7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T21:44:24.080628541Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-69vu","depends_on_id":"bd-3dl4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-27T22:56:13.948347388Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-69vu","depends_on_id":"bd-4zr0","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-27T21:44:18.732378727Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
